title: [firtool] Implement simple logging of pass executions
body:
As an one idea for https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/2448, I have created a prototype of logging during complication. Maybe there is a more useful infra in MLIR I'm missing though. 
  
This implements a simple log functionality to firtool by using mlir::PassInstrumentation (eabled by `-versobe-pass-executions`). Currently it only prints start and end messages of toplevel modules passes.

I think we can use `llvm::Timer` or `mlir::Timer` to calculate the elased time, but I choose to use  `std::chrono` directly since I felt they are overkill for this purpose. 

Output example:
```
$ firtool chipyard.TestHarness.RocketSmall1Medium1Big1_BoomMedium1Large1Mega1.top.v.lo.fir   -verbose-pass-executions
[firtool] Running "firrtl.circuit(firrtl.module(cse, firrtl-lower-chirrtl), firrtl-infer-widths, firrtl-infer-resets, firrtl-dft, firrtl-prefix-modules, firrtl-lower-types{flatten-mem=false preserve-aggregate=false preserve-public-types=true}, firrtl.module(firrtl-expand-whens, firrtl-remove-resets, canonicalize{  max-iterations=10 region-simplify=true top-down=true}, firrtl-infer-rw), firrtl-inliner, firrtl-imconstprop, firrtl-blackbox-reader{input-prefix=../../circt/perf/regress resource-prefix=../../circt/perf/regress}, firrtl.module(canonicalize{  max-iterations=10 region-simplify=true top-down=true}), firrtl-remove-unused-ports, firrtl-emit-metadata{repl-seq-mem=false repl-seq-mem-circuit= repl-seq-mem-file=}, firrtl-emit-omir{file=})"
  [firtool] Running "firrtl.module(cse, firrtl-lower-chirrtl)"
  [firtool] Done in 0.121 sec
  [firtool] Running "firrtl-infer-widths"
  [firtool] Done in 0.073 sec
  [firtool] Running "firrtl-infer-resets"
  [firtool] Done in 0.220 sec
  [firtool] Running "firrtl-dft"
  [firtool] Done in 0.055 sec
  [firtool] Running "firrtl-prefix-modules"
  [firtool] Done in 0.028 sec
  [firtool] Running "firrtl-lower-types{flatten-mem=false preserve-aggregate=false preserve-public-types=true}"
  [firtool] Done in 0.150 sec
  [firtool] Running "firrtl.module(firrtl-expand-whens, firrtl-remove-resets, canonicalize{  max-iterations=10 region-simplify=true top-down=true}, firrtl-infer-rw)"
  [firtool] Done in 0.245 sec
  [firtool] Running "firrtl-inliner"
  [firtool] Done in 0.152 sec
  [firtool] Running "firrtl-imconstprop"
  [firtool] Done in 0.547 sec
  [firtool] Running "firrtl-blackbox-reader{input-prefix=../../circt/perf/regress resource-prefix=../../circt/perf/regress}"
  [firtool] Done in 0.000 sec
  [firtool] Running "firrtl.module(canonicalize{  max-iterations=10 region-simplify=true top-down=true})"
  [firtool] Done in 0.072 sec
  [firtool] Running "firrtl-remove-unused-ports"
  [firtool] Done in 0.131 sec
  [firtool] Running "firrtl-emit-metadata{repl-seq-mem=false repl-seq-mem-circuit= repl-seq-mem-file=}"
  [firtool] Done in 0.112 sec
  [firtool] Running "firrtl-emit-omir{file=}"
  [firtool] Done in 0.000 sec
[firtool] Done in 1.905 sec
[firtool] Running "lower-firrtl-to-hw{error-on-non-const-async-reset-values=true warn-on-unprocessed-annotations=false}"
[firtool] Done in 0.252 sec
[firtool] Running "hw-memory-sim{ignore-read-enable-mem=false repl-seq-mem=false}"
[firtool] Done in 0.070 sec
[firtool] Running "hw.module(cse, canonicalize{  max-iterations=10 region-simplify=true top-down=true}, hw-cleanup, hw-legalize-modules, prettify-verilog)"
[firtool] Done in 0.273 sec
[firtool] Running "export-verilog"
[firtool] Done in 3.939 sec
```
